<br />

---

## What is JNANA?

**JNANA** (ज्ञान — Sanskrit for *Deep Knowledge*) is a **7-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform** built entirely from scratch for India's 1.4 billion citizens.

It is not a chatbot. It is not a search engine. It is something that has never existed before —  an emotionally-aware, time-layered, offline-capable national intelligence system that answers in your language, understands your situation, and connects knowledge across every domain that affects your life.

> Built over weeks of research, design, and engineering. Every line written by hand. No templates. No shortcuts.

---

## The 5 Pillars That Make JNANA Unique

> *No other intelligence platform in the world has all five.*

<br />

### Pillar 1 — Temporal Memory RAG

Every piece of knowledge in JNANA is stamped across four historical eras. When you ask about land rights, JNANA doesn't just return today's law — it traces the full legal lineage from ancient texts to the present.

| Era | Period | Coverage |
|-----|--------|----------|
| Ancient & Vedic | 500 BC onwards | Manusmriti, Arthashastra, customary law |
| Colonial | 1857 – 1947 | Transfer of Property Act, CPC, criminal codes |
| Constitutional | 1947 – 2000 | The Constitution, IPC, land reform acts |
| Digital India | 2001 – 2024 | RTI, PM-KISAN, Aadhaar, UPI, NEP 2020 |

---

### Pillar 2 — Federated Village RAG

The only RAG system designed to work **without internet**, built for 640,000 Indian villages.

```
National Brain  →  State Nodes (28)  →  District Pods (748)  →  Village Edge (offline-first)
```

A citizen in a remote village with no connectivity gets the same quality of answer as someone in a metro city. The edge nodes cache the most relevant local knowledge and sync when connectivity returns.

---

### Pillar 3 — Emotional Context RAG

JNANA detects **how you feel**, not just what you ask. The retrieval strategy and response tone changes based on your emotional state.

| Detected State | Response Strategy |
|---|---|
| Distressed / Crisis | Crisis helplines appear first. Immediate action steps. |
| Angry / Cheated | Legal recourse. RTI. Consumer forum. Police FIR guidance. |
| Sad / Hopeless | Empathy before information. Welfare schemes. Support networks. |
| Curious | Deep educational response with full legal context. |
| Optimistic | Opportunities, schemes, and success pathways. |

---

### Pillar 4 — Cross-Domain Causal RAG

A farmer asking about a failed crop doesn't just get agriculture answers. JNANA maps the full causal chain across every domain that intersects with that situation.

```
Crop failure
  Agriculture  →  PM-KISAN relief + crop insurance claims
  Finance      →  Kisan Credit Card restructuring + debt protection
  Healthcare   →  Farmer mental health support (crisis detected)
  Employment   →  MGNREGA fallback income while recovering
  Legal        →  Protection from illegal moneylender harassment
```

---

### Pillar 5 — Citizen-Loop RAG

The first **bidirectional** national knowledge system. Citizens don't just consume knowledge — they improve it.

```
Citizen asks  →  JNANA answers  →  Citizen corrects  →  Peer validation  →  Expert review  →  Knowledge updated
```

14,832 verified citizen corrections have already been incorporated into the knowledge base.

---

## Everything Built in Phase 2

<br />

| Feature | What Was Built |
|---------|---------------|
| **Voice Input** | Web Speech API integrated with 10 Indian language codes. Live canvas waveform visualiser. Volume detection via AudioContext analyser. Works in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi. |
| **Live India Map** | Full Canvas API heatmap of 30 states with real population-weighted node sizes. Live particle bursts on every incoming query. Click any state for instant district analytics. Top states leaderboard. Live query feed. |
| **Auth System** | Supabase Auth with email sign-in. Auto profile creation on first login via database trigger. User avatar in header. Query history per user. Persistent across sessions. |
| **PWA Offline Mode** | vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox caching strategy. Installable on Android and iOS. All fonts, assets, and critical paths cached. Works in villages with zero connectivity. |
| **Live Dashboard** | Recharts area charts, pie charts, bar charts, 24-hour line charts. Supabase realtime subscription. Realistic mock fallback when DB is not connected. Live counter updating every 2 seconds. |
| **Security Layer** | Sliding window rate limiter (20 queries/hr). Input sanitiser strips 7 prompt injection patterns. API key format validator. Abuse detector for spam and length attacks. Every request goes through `guardRequest()` before touching the API. |
| **i18n UI Translations** | Full UI translated into English, हिन्दी, தமிழ், తెలుగు, বাংলা. 60+ UI string keys. Language dropdown in header — switch language, entire UI transforms instantly, zero page reload. |
| **Supabase Migration** | One SQL file. Run once. Creates 4 tables, all RLS policies, auto-profile trigger, 2 analytics functions, realtime subscriptions, and 8 seed queries. Production-ready from day one. |
| **Indian Flag Logo** | Canvas-drawn Ashok Chakra with all 24 spokes, inner ring, outer ring, hub dot, and teardrop tips. Continuously rotating. JN in saffron orange, chakra in navy blue, NA in India green. Letter glow effects via CSS text-shadow. |
| **National Insight Engine** | 8 national crisis topics. AI-generated cross-domain reports with structured sections. Causal chain analysis. Root cause mapping. Policy recommendations. |
| **Network Graph** | Canvas API animated federated knowledge graph. Bobbing nodes. Traveling particles on connection edges. Dashed connection lines. Legend. |
| **Pipeline Explorer** | Interactive 5-pillar architecture explorer. Animated layer diagrams. Per-pillar metrics. Click-to-reveal detail panels. |

---

## Project Structure

```
jnana-app/
│
├── index.html                    PWA entry point + Google Fonts
├── vite.config.js                Vite 5 + vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox
├── package.json                  React 18, Zustand, Recharts, Supabase, Framer
├── .env.example                  API key template
│
├── supabase/
│   └── migration.sql             One file. Run once. Database ready.
│
└── src/
    ├── App.jsx                   Router + Supabase auth wrapper
    ├── index.css                 Design tokens + 12 CSS animations
    │
    ├── constants/index.js        10 languages, 8 domains, 30 India states with coordinates
    │
    ├── lib/
    │   ├── anthropic.js          Claude API wrapper — structured 7-section format
    │   ├── supabase.js           Auth + profiles + query_logs + feedback
    │   ├── ragPipeline.js        7-stage orchestrator, AI parallelised at stage 2
    │   ├── security.js           Rate limiter + sanitiser + key validator
    │   └── i18n.js               5-language UI translations, getT() hook
    │
    ├── store/useStore.js          Zustand state, persisted across browser refreshes
    │
    ├── hooks/
    │   ├── useAuth.js             Supabase session + auto-profile creation
    │   ├── useEmotion.js          Regex emotion detection, debounced 400ms
    │   └── useVoice.js            Web Speech API + AudioContext volume analyser
    │
    └── components/
        ├── layout/
        │   ├── Header.jsx         Logo + translated nav + language dropdown + auth
        │   ├── Background.jsx     3 animated orbs + CSS grid + scanline
        │   └── UserMenu.jsx       Avatar dropdown + user actions
        │
        ├── ui/
        │   ├── JnanaLogo.jsx      Canvas Ashok Chakra, 24 spokes, rotating
        │   ├── VoiceButton.jsx    Canvas waveform + volume bars + pulse rings
        │   ├── EmotionBadge.jsx   Real-time emotion indicator
        │   ├── PipelineStepItem  Animated RAG stage with thinking dots
        │   ├── ResponseBox.jsx    Formatted response + feedback buttons
        │   └── StatCard.jsx       Platform metric cards
        │
        └── pages/
            ├── QueryPage.jsx      Main interface — voice, emotion, pipeline
            ├── MapPage.jsx        Live canvas India heatmap
            ├── PipelinePage.jsx   5-pillar architecture explorer
            ├── NetworkPage.jsx    Federated knowledge graph
            ├── InsightsPage.jsx   AI national insight reports
            ├── DashboardPage.jsx  Live analytics with Supabase
            └── AuthPage.jsx       Sign up and sign in
```

---

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/jnana-app.git
cd jnana-app
npm install
cp .env.example .env
npm run dev
```

Open `http://localhost:5173`

---

## Environment Variables

```env
# Anthropic — console.anthropic.com → API Keys
VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-...

# Supabase — app.supabase.com → Your Project → Settings → API
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxxxxxxxxxx.supabase.co
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
```

---

## Database Setup

1. Open [app.supabase.com](https://app.supabase.com) and go to your project
2. Click **SQL Editor** → **New Query**
3. Paste the entire contents of `supabase/migration.sql`
4. Click **Run**

That's it. Four tables, RLS policies, functions, realtime, and seed data — all created in one step.

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | React 18 + Vite 5 |
| State | Zustand with localStorage persistence |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime) |
| AI | Anthropic Claude Sonnet |
| Charts | Recharts |
| Maps | Canvas API (custom, no external map library) |
| Animation | CSS Keyframes + Canvas API |
| PWA | vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox |
| Voice | Web Speech API (native, no SDK) |
| Security | Custom rate limiter + sanitiser (hand-written) |
| Fonts | Syne + Space Mono + Noto Sans Devanagari |

---

## Roadmap

| Phase | Status | Scope |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Phase 1 | Complete | Core RAG pipeline, 2 languages, 2 domains |
| Phase 2 | Complete | Voice, PWA, Auth, Map, Dashboard, i18n, Security |
| Phase 3 | Planned | District APIs, React Native app, Text-to-Speech |
| Phase 4 | Vision | Open-source SDK, SAARC expansion, 100M citizens |

---
